subcodes.first_line: He hath testified to that which God Himself hath testified: that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. This is a testimony that shall remain with thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم هذه شهاده تکون معک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
